state_notes: After an image is loaded, canvas.image_editor becomes the primary magic select target.
After a selection exists, Add/Cut brush controls and export preview become meaningful.
Fonts, text style chips, and border swatches update the generated sticker without an explicit update button.
Automation can use broadcast commands from automation-contract.json to navigate and set editor parameters without screenshot tapping.
For async commands such as magic_select, compose_sticker, load_image_path, and save_png, poll get_state until is_processing is false or the expected field changes.
